notes.zh: 外勤机骑乘时循环音会长期占用活跃 SoundData 链表节点；插件扫描或改写这些节点可能与原生音频引擎竞态，导致游戏崩溃。
notes.en: Guideroid mount loop sounds hold long-lived nodes on the active SoundData list; scanning or modifying them can race the native audio engine and crash the game.

notes.zh: 外勤机相关音效路径兜底（同上：不宜扫描活跃 SoundData 节点）
notes.en: Catch-all for other Guideroid SCD paths (same ActiveSoundData scan risk)
